packageRules.description: Only track Fedora releases that have reached GA; bump this cap when the next Fedora version is released (GAs ~April/Oct).

Stay on cosign v2.x: v3 defaults to OCI 1.1 referrer signatures in the new bundle format that bootc/containers-image can't read (it only reads the legacy `<digest>.sig` tag). See the Install cosign step in build.yml for when we can upgrade. Tracking: https://github.com/containers/container-libs/issues/388

customManagers.description: Track the cosign binary version pinned via the cosign-installer `cosign-release` input.
